title: gomphostemma javanicum f. phlomoides
intro: Gomphostemma javanicum f. phlomoides is a lesser-known plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is also known as a type of mint plant with medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Gomphostemma javanicum f. phlomoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, offering a natural remedy for its medicinal benefits.
